upcoming.title: Sitaare Zameen Par
upcoming.shortDescription: After a DUI, an arrogant basketball coach must train neurodivergent adults for community service, only to discover that his players will change his outlook on life. Catch Sitaare Zameen Par streaming from 3rd April, only on Sony LIV.
